title: LLM Token Heatmap Activation Diff
description: On-disk payload produced by `compare_activations(trace_a, trace_b, ...)`. Carries per-step `delta` records, one per (step, layer, submodule), plus alignment metadata describing how the two source traces were matched up (`token_id` vs `position`). Consumed by the CLI `diff` subcommand and the diff-mode UI. One file == one (trace_a, trace_b) pair.

schema_version.description: Semver of this schema. Bumped independently of the main trace and activation schemas. Consumers must hard-fail on unknown major.

alignment.description: How the two source traces were aligned, including any per-step mismatches that the comparator flagged.

steps.description: Per-step diff records, ordered by the aligned `step` index. Length equals the number of successfully aligned steps; unmatched steps from either side are listed in `alignment.mismatches` instead.

Alignment.description: Records the alignment mode applied by `compare_activations`, the tokenizer fingerprints of the two source traces, and any positions the comparator could not align.

mode.description: Alignment strategy used. `token_id` zips traces on step index, requiring identical token ids; `position` zips on `decoded_text_offset`, tolerating different tokenizers; `auto` picks `token_id` when the fingerprints match, else `position`.

tokenizer_a_fingerprint.description: `activation_metadata.tokenizer_fingerprint` of trace A. Equal to `tokenizer_b_fingerprint` whenever `mode == "token_id"` (or when `mode == "auto"` resolved to id-based alignment).

mismatches.description: Steps that could not be aligned (e.g. divergent token ids under `token_id` mode, or non-overlapping decoded-text offsets under `position` mode). Empty array when the two traces aligned cleanly.

AlignmentMismatch.description: A single step where alignment failed. At least one of `step_a` or `step_b` is present, allowing the consumer to render the unmatched step on the correct side of the diff UI.

step_a.description: Zero-indexed step in trace A that could not be aligned, or null if the unmatched step is on the B side.

step_b.description: Zero-indexed step in trace B that could not be aligned, or null if the unmatched step is on the A side.

DiffStep.description: Diff record for a single aligned step. Carries the cross-tokenizer alignment fields from both source traces so consumers can re-render the corresponding token on either side without revisiting the originals.

step.description: Zero-indexed step in the aligned output.

token_id_a.description: Selected `token_id` from trace A at this step.

token_id_b.description: Selected `token_id` from trace B at this step. Equal to `token_id_a` under `token_id` alignment; may differ under `position` alignment.

decoded_text_offset_a.description: Character offset of this step's decoded token in trace A's decoded text.

decoded_text_offset_b.description: Character offset of this step's decoded token in trace B's decoded text.

delta.description: Per (layer, submodule) deltas. Ordering matches the producer's iteration over the captured submodules of trace A.

LayerDelta.description: Difference between trace A and trace B for one (layer, submodule) at one aligned step.

submodule.description: Submodule name (e.g. `resid_pre`, `mlp.down_proj`). MUST appear in both source traces' `activation_metadata.captured_submodules`.

l2.description: L2 norm of the activation difference vector `(a - b)` at this (layer, submodule).

cosine.description: Cosine similarity between trace A's and trace B's activation vectors. `1.0` means identical direction; `-1.0` means opposite.

top_changed_neurons.description: Neurons with the largest absolute delta at this (layer, submodule), sorted by descending `|delta|`.

index.description: Zero-indexed neuron position within the layer's hidden dimension.

delta.description: Signed delta `(a_value - b_value)` at this neuron index.
